# 函数: useMemo()

```ts
function useMemo<T>(factory: () => T, deps: DependencyList): T
```

`useMemo` will only recompute the memoized value when one of the `deps` has changed.

## 类型参数

| 类型参数 |
| ------ |
| `T` |

## 参数

| 范围 | 类型 |
| ------ | ------ |
| `factory` | () => `T` |
| `deps` | `DependencyList` |

## 返回

`T`

16.8.0
